title: nephrodium parallelogrammum
intro: Nephrodium parallelogrammum, also known as the Parallelogram Fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae and is native to various regions in Asia and North America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Nephrodium parallelogrammum include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves of this plant are often dried and used in teas, infusions, or as a powder to harness its medicinal benefits.
